sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10171" key="a)ntimeteile/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμετειλέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n10171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be unrolled in reverse direction,</tr_> of cables, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:22:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.22.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
